title: angelica hultenii
intro: Angelica hultenii, also known as Sichuan angelica, is a type of flowering plant in the carrot family native to China. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antiseptic, and antiviral effects. The health benefits of Angelica hultenii include reducing fever, alleviating pain, and supporting the immune system, making it a popular ingredient in herbal remedies for respiratory issues and digestive problems. Angelica hultenii can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or decoction for its medicinal benefits, and is often used in combination with other herbs in traditional Chinese medicine.
